scripts.seed:all:inside: npm run seed:slots:inside && npm run seed:scheduler-test:inside
scripts.seed:slots: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec backend npm run seed:slots:inside
scripts.seed:scheduler-test: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec backend npm run seed:scheduler-test:inside
scripts.seed:all: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec backend npm run seed:all:inside
